steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now examine the rendered dashboard to verify it meets all the specifications.

The dashboard is now complete and meets all the specified requirements:

1. Header: Fixed at the top with height 60px, background #1a1a4e, containing the 'InsightFlow' logo in white on the left and navigation links on the right.

2. Main content: Has appropriate padding (20px on mobile, 40px on desktop) below the header.

3. Metric cards: Four cards arranged in a 4-column grid at 1920px, with prop
